query: Count all 1 km grid cells in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry as EWKT

2.description: reduce 200-year storm-flood polygons to Kristiansand extent (will use EWKT from step 1)

3.description: reduce 1km grid cells to Kristiansand extent (will use EWKT from step 1)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect storm-flood polygons

5.description: count distinct grid cell ids that intersect storm-flood polygons

executions.sql:
WITH k AS (SELECT ST_GeomFromEWKT(omrade_ewkt) AS geom FROM (SELECT ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%') t)
SELECT s.*
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s, k
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT geom FROM k));

args.sql:
WITH k AS (SELECT ST_GeomFromEWKT(omrade_ewkt) AS geom FROM (SELECT ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%') t)
SELECT s.*
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s, k
WHERE s.omrade && ST_Envelope((SELECT geom FROM k))
  AND ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT geom FROM k));

args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
WITH k AS (SELECT ST_GeomFromEWKT(omrade_ewkt) AS geom FROM (SELECT ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%') t)
SELECT s.*
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s, k
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT geom FROM k));
